# Inkx

> Ink, but components know their size

A terminal UI framework for React with two-phase rendering

## Table of Contents

### Introduction

- [Getting Started](/inkx/guide/getting-started.md)
- [Installation](/inkx/guide/installation.md)
- [Why Inkx?](/inkx/guide/why-inkx.md)

### Core Concepts

- [Components](/inkx/guide/components.md)
- [Hooks](/inkx/guide/hooks.md)
- [Scrolling](/inkx/guide/scrolling.md)

### Migration

- [Migration from Ink](/inkx/guide/migration.md)

### Components

- [Box](/inkx/api/box.md)
- [Text](/inkx/api/text.md)
- [Newline](/inkx/api/newline.md)
- [Spacer](/inkx/api/spacer.md)
- [Static](/inkx/api/static.md)

- [useLayout](/inkx/api/use-layout.md)
- [useInput](/inkx/api/use-input.md)
- [useApp](/inkx/api/use-app.md)
- [useStdout](/inkx/api/use-stdout.md)

- [render](/inkx/api/render.md)
